creator: asami@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Unfortunately, currently there is no way to depend on static library. 
Also, the nas port/package includes both, so it kinda works. 

The "look in wrong directory for executable" is due to user's PATH 
not including ${PREFIX}/bin and such.  This is reported elsewhere, 
some fixes are suggested, and will be tried after the 2.1 release.
